review: This place has good food, especially the beans, but the line can take up to 1/2 an hour just to ORDER!  Them it's another half an hour to get your food.  This place is an all-day affair. If you call in, it's marginally faster--IF you can get through to them.  They need to staff more people. Maybe 5 more people. One to answer the phones and get drinks, two for orders, one to bus tables and clean and another cook/prep.  They are usually out of tortillas by the time I get to the front of the line.
